data.name: Elf World Adventure 2
data.detailed_description:
Project: Stellar Girls


關於此遊戲

GAMEPLAY:




Elf World Adventure 2 is a sequel to the addictive hentai game in the anime and puzzle genre, offering many levels in which you have to collect images of charming elf girls. Immerse yourself in a magical world with a splendid atmosphere, accompanied by relaxing and melodic music. The game will delight you not only with a variety of challenging and captivating puzzles but also with many beautiful achievements that you can use to decorate your profile, showcasing your successes in the world of elves.

BEAUTIFUL ACHIEVEMENTS:


FEATURES:




  • Hentai Experience: Engage in a game that blends puzzle-solving with hentai elements.
  • Chill Atmosphere: Immerse yourself in a magical world with beautiful, soothing music.
  • Casual Gameplay: Simple controls and an accessible interface make the game enjoyable for everyone.
  • Beautiful Elf Girls: Discover stunning images of elf girls.
  • Steam Profile Achievements: Decorate your Steam profile with vibrant achievements.
  • Multiple Levels: Enjoy a large number of levels.

data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 芬蘭文, 瑞典文, 義大利文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 越南文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 日文, 法文, 保加利亞文, 荷蘭文, 匈牙利文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5-6500 / AMD Ryzen™ 5 1600 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1660 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i5-6500 / AMD Ryzen™ 5 1600 or higher
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1660 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
